examples: My grandpa brought us here and he has gone to buy some ice-lolly.

The grand prize went to Lobster Bake Yum Yum and Lolly Pop, two small Chihuahua's.
Who, for example, can name the inventor of the hair-dryer (Chester Beach), the electric washing machine (Alva Fisher) or the ice lolly (Frank Epperson)?
Some of the lofty bridges we clatter across are supported by reassuring iron arcs, but others stand on little more than a lattice of glorified lolly sticks.
